calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Meeghan Buckley appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court stated that it reviewed the docket, that it finds that the form of title presumption under Evidence Code 662 has been rebutted, and that it is prepared to take the matter under submission with the intent to grant the petition. Mrs. Buckley stated that she has nothing to add. The Petition for Spousal Property is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Continued To Nov-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
